hypothesis: If SAM 2 is fine-tuned on diverse synthetic LPTEM videos, then SAM-EM will achieve higher segmentation and localization accuracy (IoU, F1, composite J&F, and centroid agreement with manual annotations) across simulated test scenarios and real LPTEM data than a U-Net baseline, because the foundation model's pretrained features combined with domain-specific fine-tuning enable better generalization to low-SNR, variable-resolution liquid-phase TEM images.
